subcodes.first_line: O divine physician of Tabriz, be thou ardent and enrapturing, sweet as honey and fragrant as musk, that in the assembly of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب روحانی تبریزی تب ریز شو و شورانگیز و شهدآمیز و مشکبیز تا در بزم یار
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
